name: Kale with Cream (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the kale and strip the leaves from the stalks.
2. Plunge the kale into a pot of briskly boiling salted water.
3. Cook until tender, 20-30 minutes.
4. Drain well and chop finely.
5. In a saucepan combine the butter, cream, nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
6. Add the chopped kale and stock to the saucepan.
7. Mix well and cook until heated through and the sauce is slightly reduced.
